arguments.query: Bracken County library system official body

stages.purpose: Identify the authoritative organization and reject the secondary distractor.

arguments.query: site:bracken-library.fixture board minutes 2026 Sunday hours approved branches

stages.purpose: Use the resolved organization to locate a primary source for the requested fact.
Read the primary document itself rather than relying on its search snippet.

response_constraints: Cite the fetched primary-source URL rather than a search-results page.
Treat search snippets as navigation aids, not final evidence.
Separate sourced facts from any inference.
List Ash Branch, Meridian Branch, and Willow Branch in alphabetical order.
Omit Pine Branch because the primary minutes do not show approval.

prompt: Find the authoritative body for the Bracken County library system, then fetch the primary board minutes that name the branches approved for Sunday hours in 2026. Report the approved branch names alphabetically and omit branches that were merely discussed.

search_1.query: Bracken County library system official body

results.title: Official site — Bracken County Library Board

search_2.query: site:bracken-library.fixture board minutes 2026 Sunday hours approved branches

fetch_1.title: Board Minutes — 12 February 2026
fetch_1.content: The board approved Sunday hours at Willow Branch, Ash Branch, and Meridian Branch. Pine Branch was discussed but no motion was made.
